note: Implemented settings persistence and backend sync: 1) Created NotificationPreference model + EF migration for backend storage. 2) Added POST /api/v1/notification-settings endpoint (upsert by FCM token). 3) Updated NotificationSchedulerJob to check global enabled toggle and event type filters. 4) Created NotificationSettingsSyncService in Flutter with exponential backoff retry. 5) Wired sync into NotificationSettingsNotifier.update() (fire-and-forget after local save). 6) Added sync service tests. All 490 backend unit tests pass.
